items.title: The Raptors interest makes a lot of sense. But if I were a Hornets fan coming off last season and see my best player get traded for Immanuel Quickley, additional salary and picks I’d be pretty pissed.
items.author: Erik García Gundersen
items.body_excerpt: The Raptors interest makes a lot of sense. But if I were a Hornets fan coming off last season and see my best player get traded for Immanuel Quickley, additional salary and picks I’d be pretty pissed.

items.title: I hope RJ Barrett, Immanuel Quickley and the pick that became Jonathan Mogbo all have wonderful weekends
items.author: Sam DiGiovanni
items.body_excerpt: I hope RJ Barrett, Immanuel Quickley and the pick that became Jonathan Mogbo all have wonderful weekends
